articles.title: WHAT “WORKING” MEANS IN THE ERA OF AI APPS
articles.summary: AI-native startups are reaching revenue milestones faster than ever, with median ARR surpassing pre-AI benchmarks across both B2B and B2C. Speed, retention, and product velocity are now critical differentiators in a landscape where exceptional growth increasingly outpaces the norm.

articles.title: WHY AI STARTUPS ARE BLOWING PAST REVENUE MILESTONES THAT OLD-SCHOOL SAAS COULD ONLY FANTASIZE ABOUT
articles.summary: AI startups are achieving faster revenue growth by delivering instant value, adopting usage-based pricing, and replacing traditional workflows with lean, AI-driven models. This structural shift is redefining product development, monetization, and organizational design.

articles.title: THE UNIMPACTFUL PM
articles.summary: Expectations for product leaders are shifting, with AI reducing the need for headcount and CEOs demanding faster, clearer impact. To truly drive change, PMs must have control over product vision, R&D resources, or business KPIs.

articles.title: CONTEXT, COLLABORATION, INTENT, AND INVESTMENT
articles.summary: By breaking down organizational dynamics into Context, Intent, Collaboration, and Investment, this framework clarifies how teams align, act, and allocate resources. It exposes gaps in shared understanding and helps build lasting models that guide decisions beyond short-term planning cycles.

articles.title: TRANSFORMING YOUR EXPERIMENTS INTO A GROWTH ENGINE, WITH ELENA VERNA
articles.summary: "We should test that" isn't enough anymore. Elena shares top insights from 15 years at SaaS companies on turning your testing program into a growth engine. Watch this session for free [8] + unlock every other session from Optimizely's recent Test & Learn event. Register for

articles.title: AGENT MANAGEMENT INTERFACE PATTERNS
articles.summary: As AI agents take on more tasks, managing them effectively has become central to product design. This piece explores how common interface patterns can help users intuitively launch, guide, and monitor agents, and weighs the tradeoffs between familiarity and the unique needs of agent-centric workflows.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD AGENTIC AI[AGENTS]
articles.summary: This article builds on Anthropic's framework to share lasting best practices for Agentic AI - emphasizing simplicity, transparency, and reliable agent-computer interfaces. It compares structured workflows with dynamic agents, highlighting which approach fits best for domains like law, finance, and general-purpose tools.

articles.title: CREATING INTELLIGENT PRODUCTS
articles.summary: Today's most successful intelligent products combine deterministic systems with probabilistic reasoning, and product teams must learn to treat this probabilistic approach not as a novelty, but as essential to creating valuable, adaptive experiences.

articles.title: SAY IT OUT LOUD
articles.summary: Unspoken appreciation can keep even close relationships surface-level, but voicing admiration fosters deep connection and lasting impact. Praise, when shared directly or overheard, affirms worth, builds trust, and inspires others to do the same.

articles.title: MISTAKE-PROOF YOUR PRODUCT: HOW ‘POKA YOKE' CAN TRANSFORM YOUR DESIGN STRATEGY
articles.summary: Poka yoke, a Japanese design principle, emphasizes building systems that prevent user errors by design rather than blaming human behavior.

articles.title: ANXIETY IN PRODUCT ROLES
articles.summary: Anxiety in product roles can be a powerful tool when harnessed correctly.
